trialBalance.title: Trial Balance
trialBalance.subtitle: Financial position overview
trialBalance.prompt: Select parameters and click Generate Report
trialBalance.noData: No transactions found for this period.
trialBalance.loadError: Failed to load report. Please try again.

profitLoss.title: Profit & Loss Statement
profitLoss.subtitle: Revenue, expenses, and net profit analysis
profitLoss.noRevenue: No revenue data for this period
profitLoss.noExpense: No expense data for this period

generalLedger.title: General Ledger
generalLedger.subtitle: View all posted transactions
generalLedger.noData: No ledger entries found. Post some vouchers to see data here.
generalLedger.loadError: Failed to load General Ledger. Please try again.

voucherLedgerImpact.title: Ledger Impact
voucherLedgerImpact.subtitle: Posted ledger entries created by voucher {{voucherNo}}.
voucherLedgerImpact.emptyDraft: This voucher has not posted to the ledger yet. Ledger impact appears only after posting succeeds.
voucherLedgerImpact.emptyPosted: This posted voucher has no ledger rows. That may indicate a data integrity issue and should be reviewed.

aging.title: Aging Report
aging.subtitle: Track outstanding receivables and payables by age buckets.
aging.emptyDesc: Adjust your filters or date range to see results.
aging.modeAutoInfo: Automatic mode: report includes posting AR/AP-style accounts only. Cash and header/group accounts are excluded by design. Use Account filter to target a specific account or group.
aging.modeManualInfo: Manual mode: report is scoped to the selected account (and its descendants when applicable). Use this when you know the exact AP/AR structure to analyze.

consolidated.title: Consolidated Trial Balance
consolidated.subtitle: Group-level trial balance across companies
consolidated.empty: No consolidated data available for selected parameters.
consolidated.loadError: Failed to load consolidated trial balance.

bankRec.title: Bank Reconciliation
bankRec.subtitle: Reconcile bank statements with ledger entries
bankRec.completeHint: All statement lines must be matched before completing.
bankRec.importPrompt: To begin reconciliation, upload a bank statement file for the selected account.

budgetVsActual.title: Budget vs Actual
budgetVsActual.subtitle: Compare approved budgets with actual postings over a selected period
budgetVsActual.missingFiscalYear: Fiscal year not found for selected budget.
budgetVsActual.invalidRange: Date range is outside selected fiscal year.

journal.title: Journal / Day Book
journal.subtitle: Chronological record of all voucher entries
journal.empty: No journal entries found for the selected criteria.

voucherList.subtitle: Filter, open, approve, post, print, reverse, or delete accounting vouchers.
voucherList.deleteBody: Are you sure you want to delete this voucher?
voucherList.deleteWarning: After confirming deletion, you cannot undo this action and the entry will be lost permanently.

voucherEditor.readOnly: This voucher is {{status}} and cannot be edited.

home.title: Accounting Overview
home.subtitle: Manage transactions, monitor approvals, and generate reports.
home.financialReportsDesc: Balance Sheet, Trial Balance, Profit & Loss, and Aging Report
home.balanceSheetDesc: View Assets, Liabilities, and Equity with retained earnings in one snapshot.
home.trialBalanceDesc: Quickly verify that debits and credits are balanced across the chart.
home.profitLossDesc: Analyze revenue and expenses for the selected period with one click.
home.agingReportDesc: Track outstanding receivables and payables by age buckets

approvals.title: Approval Center
approvals.subtitle: Manage your pending financial verifications and custody confirmations.
approvals.noneApproval: All caught up! No vouchers pending your approval.
approvals.noneCustody: No assets awaiting your physical confirmation.

settings.title: Accounting Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your company's accounting preferences and policies

general.description: Configure general company preferences that affect the accounting module
general.timezoneDesc: Select the primary timezone for financial reports and transaction timestamps
general.dateFormatDesc: Choose how dates are displayed across the application
general.fxAccountDesc: Primary account for exchange differences. Pre-fills the wizard below and serves as a default for all modules.

currencies.description: Manage your enterprise currency list and base currency

policies.description: Configure approval gates and posting behavior
policies.approvalDesc: Enable approval requirements before vouchers can be posted to ledger
policies.financialApprovalHelp: Require manager approval for vouchers before they affect the ledger.
policies.custodyHelp: Ensure funds/assets are physically received by the custodian.
policies.thirdPartyHelp: Who validates vouchers where creator ≠ sender/receiver (e.g. transfers).
policies.reversalHelp: How to handle confirmation for reversal (correction) vouchers.
policies.selfConfirmHelp: Allow the voucher creator to also confirm custody if they are the receiver.
policies.selfConfirmHint: Allow creators to confirm their own receipts.
policies.blockMissingHelp: Prevent submission if no valid custodian user is assigned to the cash account.
policies.blockMissingHint: Block submission if custodian is missing.
policies.amountThresholdHelp: Set a minimum monetary value. Vouchers below this amount skip custody confirmation.
policies.amountThresholdOn: Custody confirmation required only for vouchers exceeding this amount.
policies.amountThresholdOff: Minimum amount disabled. Custody confirmation required for ALL vouchers.

costCenter.description: Define when cost center assignment is mandatory
costCenter.title: Enforce Cost Centers
costCenter.subtitle: Require cost center assignment on specific account types

fxRevaluation.description: Configure automatic exchange rate revaluation for multi-currency accounts

errorMode.title: Policy Error Mode
errorMode.description: Control how validation failures are reported
errorMode.validationDesc: Choose how the system reacts when multiple policy rules are violated
errorMode.failFastDesc: Stop and report on the first error encountered. Faster performance but may require multiple attempts to fix all issues.
errorMode.aggregateDesc: Run all checks and report all errors at once. Provides a comprehensive list of what needs fixing.

fiscal.title: Accounting Periods
fiscal.description: Define your company's financial reporting periods and fiscal years
fiscal.isAdjustmentDesc: Check this for year-end adjustment entries that should fall into the optional 13th period (P13).
fiscal.periodLockingHelp: Freeze all accounting data before a specific date to prevent historical changes.
fiscal.periodLockingHint: Block backdated postings before a specific date.
fiscal.lockedThroughDateDesc: No vouchers can be posted or edited on or before this date.
fiscal.dateRequired: Locked Through Date is required when period locking is enabled.

closePeriod.title: Close Accounting Period
closePeriod.question: Are you sure you want to close {{period}}?
closePeriod.description: This will prevent any further modifications to vouchers in this specific month.

reopenPeriod.title: Reopen Accounting Period
reopenPeriod.question: Are you sure you want to reopen {{period}}?
reopenPeriod.description: This will allow you to edit or post new vouchers to this month. Data integrity for reports may be affected.

closeYear.title: Finalize Fiscal Year
closeYear.question: Are you sure you want to finalize {{year}}?
closeYear.description: Closing is a permanent operation. All monthly periods will be locked and a year-end closing entry will be generated to clear P&L balances to {{account}}.
closeYear.descLock: All 12 monthly periods will be automatically closed and locked.
closeYear.descClear: P&L balances will be cleared to the selected Retained Earnings account via a closing voucher.

reopenYear.title: Reopen Fiscal Year
reopenYear.question: Are you sure you want to reopen {{year}}?
reopenYear.description: Reopening will unlock the year's status. Note: This will NOT automatically delete or reverse the existing closing voucher. You must handle the closing entry manually.

deleteYear.title: Delete Fiscal Year
deleteYear.question: Are you sure you want to permanently delete fiscal year {{year}}?
deleteYear.description: This action cannot be undone and will remove all associated periods and historical configuration.

numbering.title: Voucher Numbering
numbering.description: Configure sequential voucher numbers per type/prefix

messages.fiscalYearExists: A fiscal year for {{year}} already exists. Duplicate years are not allowed.
messages.retainedEarningsExists: Retained Earnings account already exists. Selected it.
messages.fiscalYearClosedError: Cannot modify period because the fiscal year is closed. You must reopen the fiscal year before you can change the status of its monthly periods.
messages.prefixRequired: Prefix and next number are required

accountStatement.title: Account Statement
accountStatement.subtitle: Running balance per account with previous and closing balances.
accountStatement.selectPrompt: Select an account and date range, then click Load to view the statement.

voucherWindow.newTooltip: Create a new voucher in this window
voucherWindow.mustLines: Voucher must have at least 2 lines
voucherWindow.confirmSubmitBody: This will lock the voucher and notify approvers. You cannot edit it afterwards.

tooltip.reversalCannotReverse: This is a reversal voucher and cannot be reversed again.
tooltip.alreadyReversed: This voucher has already been reversed.
tooltip.createReversal: This voucher is locked. Create a reversal to correct it.

success.custodyMsg: You have successfully confirmed custody of this voucher.
success.postedMsg: Voucher has been posted to the ledger.
success.submittedMsg: Voucher has been sent for approval.

voucherTable.empty: No vouchers found matching your filters.

voucherTotals.baseNote: All vouchers affect the ledger in {{base}} (base currency) only.
voucherTotals.convertedNote: Totals above are shown in {{currency}} for display.

voucherWindow.newTooltip: Create a new voucher in this window
voucherWindow.mustLines: Voucher must have at least 2 lines
voucherWindow.confirmSubmitBody: This will lock the voucher and notify approvers. You cannot edit it afterwards.

tooltip.reversalCannotReverse: This is a reversal voucher and cannot be reversed again.
tooltip.alreadyReversed: This voucher has already been reversed.
tooltip.createReversal: This voucher is locked. Create a reversal to correct it.

success.custodyMsg: You have successfully confirmed custody of this voucher.
success.postedMsg: Voucher has been posted to the ledger.
success.submittedMsg: Voucher has been sent for approval.

unsavedChangesModal.title: Unsaved Changes
unsavedChangesModal.description: You have unsaved changes in this document. Are you sure you want to close without saving?

tooltips.manualOverride: Manual override (Click status dot to reset)

accountingDashboard.title: Accounting Dashboard
accountingDashboard.subtitle: Real-time overview of your financial operations and required actions.
accountingDashboard.financialReportsHint: Access P&L, Balance Sheet, Trial Balance.

parentWarning.title: Invalid Parent Selection
parentWarning.attempt: You are attempting to create a new account as a child of
parentWarning.postingRule: is a Posting Account (transaction level). In a professional Chart of Accounts, only Header Accounts can have children.
parentWarning.instruction: To organize your accounts correctly, please select a Header Account (Summary Account) before clicking the creation button, or create a root-level account first.

accountsList.searchPlaceholder: Search by account code or name...

costCenterSummary.title: Cost Center Summary
costCenterSummary.subtitle: Breakdown of accounts by cost center
costCenterSummary.noEntriesHint: No ledger entries match the selected cost center and date range.

subgroupTagging.title: Subgroup Tagging Tool
subgroupTagging.subtitle: Tag accounts for Trading Account and structured Profit & Loss reporting.
subgroupTagging.noAccountsFound: No accounts found for this filter.

errors.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one account to apply subgroup changes.
errors.singleClassification: Bulk assign requires same classification selection (or apply a classification filter).
errors.chooseSubgroup: Choose a subgroup value before applying.
errors.multipleClassifications: Selected accounts contain multiple classifications. Narrow selection first.
errors.noPendingChanges: No pending subgroup changes to save.

subgroupTagging.confirmBody: Update {{count}} account(s) with new subgroup assignments?

accountForm.parentTip: Tip: Selecting a parent automatically locks the account type to ensure data integrity.
accountForm.hierarchyError: Hierarchy Error: Account "{{account}}" is a Posting account and cannot be selected as a parent.
accountForm.setBySourceField: Set by the field you're adding from
accountForm.accountingHint: Classification defines the core nature of this account and its position on financial statements.
accountForm.currencyDescription: Define multi-currency behavior for this account
accountForm.rootCurrencyLocked: Root level accounts are locked to the company base currency ({{currency}}).
accountForm.parentCurrencyEnforced: This account resides under a foreign-currency parent ({{currency}}). The parent's currency policy is enforced.
accountForm.requiresApprovalDescription: Require management approval for every transaction involving this account. Recommended for cash and sensitive bank accounts.
accountForm.requiresCustodyDescription: Transactions must be verified by the assigned custodian before posting.
